event_description: Turbine is stopped due to a main bearing damage
Turbine is in standstill since 01.08 due to rotorbearing damage.
Harting plug Nacelle/HUB damaged + NCR20_HUB: Wiring blade control system
Converter Failure from 17.11 12:30 - 18.11. 13:57, Fuse Filter Supply

Failure due to Rotorbrake and Hydraulic problemes - Hydraulic pump A disabeld, 2h later turbine back in production - Analysis indicates a longer anomaly in temp_hydraulic_oil_tank_1_average until 15.01.2024 which is neither confirmed nor refuted.
10115 : Oil level error, two-pump mode + Oil Leakage Gear Oil Supply + 12019: Rotor brake B cannot be closed + P20_yaw carbon brush damaged
We had some failures (störung 24VAC Versorgung Rotorbremse) on the 16th in the afternoon. From 17th onwards a longer standstill where we don't know the root cause to.
15004 : Safety chain relay open + 93005 : Gear oil cooler bypass valve
Pitchfailure - defect Beckhoffcard, Axis 2, rectified on 23/01 - Anomalie liegt aber länger an als der Fehler, Batterien waren ok
Randomn small failures regarding pitch resulting in a longer standstill due to a defect pitch encoder (26/02)
Pitch failure - defect fan on pitch motor
P20_DGUV-v3 RCD 28F1 NC310 defective + 0 : P20_Blades_Cabinet Caps missing
Valve in water cooling system was left in wrong position after maintenance actions on 05-08-2020
Failure 2023-04-05 03:30 - defective coupling between gear oil pump and motor
Communication and Pitchfailure - slip ring and Beckhoff card
Turbine has some issues with overpressure on the main transformer
WEC in failure - current measurement own consumption
COMMUNICATION FAULT BK1120 IN NC300 A2
Turbine had several short standstills (max 8min) with failure "Schwingungen Umrichter Drehmomenten Level 1"
WEC in failure - hub battery charger defect
WEC in failure with pitch battery issues - rewiring
